name: Scrambled Egg Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups soft bread cubes, sauteed in butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the milk with the bread cubes and set aside to soak.
2. Beat the eggs lightly and mix with the beater.
3. Add the melted butter to the beaten eggs.
4. Combine the eggs, butter, and soaked bread cubes.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased baking dish (9 x 13 inch).
6. Refrigerate overnight.
7. When ready to bake, layer the cheese, bacon, and sauteed bread cubes on top of the egg mixture.
8. Bake at 400 degrees for 25 to 30 minutes or until set.
